method_summary: Three-tiered monitoring approach (within-run, cross-run, structural) using variance-based characterization with FMEA-inspired severity classification to prioritize findings
key_innovation: Variance-based monitoring scope characterization that distinguishes deterministic stage defects, stochastic integration consequences, and structural integration gaps
datasets_used: synthetic testbed with 220 runs across 120 document bundles
best_result: Structural monitor identifies integration gap with perfect consistency (CV = 0.00)
title: Monitoring Agentic Systems Before They're Reliable
